name: Amber Command: 1979

light.canvasScript:
/** Ink Fragments */
const CONFIG = { shardCount: 10, color: 'rgba(43, 40, 35, 0.1)', driftSpeed: 0.1 };

oled.canvasScript:
/** Green Phosphor Shards */

her.canvasScript:

author: silentoplayz (G30)
description: Vintage CRT terminal aesthetic with amber monochrome tones, scan-line flicker effects, and Geometric Mainframe Canvas FX.
